Text.Page: When I was with the Free Brotherhood I made weapons—wonderful weapons. Now those Lokian monsters are using them to kill people.<NEXTPAGEBUTTON>"Were they magical?"</NEXTPAGEBUTTON>
Not really, but they were better and stronger and sharper...I was very good at it. And now we need to get those weapons out of Lokian hands. Will you help?
It's good to see these. They can serve a better purpose now.
Please get my weapons back. They're using them against us.
